title: Abes Hutt's Cobblemon
description: A fork of Cobblemon to integrate better into the Cobblemon Academy modpack
body:
This is a modified fork of the [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) mod for use in the [Cobblemon Academy](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/cobblemon-academy) modpack to better integrate with the rest of it's features.

The source is easily viewable [here](https://github.com/Delta-Academy-MC/Cobblemon).

Please do not seek support from the official Cobblemon team if you encounter issues with this mod and instead forward any questions or issues to the official Cobblemon Academy discord [here](https://discord.com/invite/cobblemon-academy) or to the issue board [here](https://github.com/Delta-Academy-MC/Cobblemon/issues).

Some of the changes to the mod:
- Mega evolution with all the megastones and mega bracelets that integrate with Trinkets
- Terastallization with z-crystals and tera orbs that integrate with Trinkets
- PokeBags as a portable storage solution that integrates with Trinkets
- New battle UI to assist in learning and keeping track of your opponents team
- Added support for battle rules such as timers and bag clause
